{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent output provides a clear and concise summary of the discussion section, identifying substantive issues around overclaiming, structural drift, and filler passages.",
    "R1.2": "The agent output engages with the argument chain, identifying logical consistency issues and proposing localized fixes.",
    "R1.4": "The agent output assesses novelty by mapping against prior work and identifying sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "RX.1": "The agent output discloses uncertainty for each recommendation, marking confidence and missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "The agent output adheres to the scope of the active set, covering exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "The agent output avoids downstream harm by identifying harmful patterns in the original artifact.",
    "RX.5": "The agent output provides provenance and traceability for each non-cosmetic change, annotating sources and reasons."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.85,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.92,
    "RX.5": 0.88
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent output provides a clear and concise summary of the discussion section, identifying substantive issues around overclaiming, structural drift, and filler passages.
rationale.R1.2: The agent output engages with the argument chain, identifying logical consistency issues and proposing localized fixes.
rationale.R1.4: The agent output assesses novelty by mapping against prior work and identifying sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.RX.1: The agent output discloses uncertainty for each recommendation, marking confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The agent output adheres to the scope of the active set, covering exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The agent output avoids downstream harm by identifying harmful patterns in the original artifact.
rationale.RX.5: The agent output provides provenance and traceability for each non-cosmetic change, annotating sources and reasons.
